allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; p=json.load\(sys.stdin\); rules=p.get\('rules',[]\); print\('total rules:',len\(rules\)\); [print\(r\) for r in rules if 'quilt' in str\(r\).lower\(\) or r.get\('color'\)=='hide' or r.get\('show_item'\)==False][:10]")

hooks.command: F=$(python -c "import json,sys;d=json.load(sys.stdin);print((d.get('tool_response') or {}).get('filePath') or (d.get('tool_input') or {}).get('file_path') or '')"); case "$F" in *.rs) cargo fmt --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml 2>/dev/null ;; esac
